net.leaderos.shared.module

Class LeaderOSModule

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.leaderos.shared.module.LeaderOSModule
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Modulable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AuthLogin, Bazaar, Cache, Credit, Voucher, WebStore

    public abstract class LeaderOSModule
extends Object
implements Modulable
    Represents a Module and its main class. It contains fundamental methods and fields for a module to be loaded and work properly. This is an indirect implementation of Modulable.
    Since:
    1.0
    Author:
    poyrazinan
